mission.title: metal3-io: Host should be powered down once deleted
mission.description: Host should be powered down once deleted. Community-reported issue.

steps.title: Identify metal3-io troubleshoot symptoms
steps.description:
Check for the issue in your metal3-io deployment:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n metal3-io -l app.kubernetes.io/name=metal3-io
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=metal3-io -n metal3-io --tail=100 | grep -i error
```
Look for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue.

steps.title: Review metal3-io configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant metal3-io configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n metal3-io -l app.kubernetes.io/name=metal3-io
kubectl get configmap -n metal3-io -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=metal3-io
```
If a Host is provisioned (not externallyProvisioned) when it is deleted, we deprovision the server before deletion completes. However, if it is powered on, we do not power it off.

steps.title: Apply the fix for Host should be powered down once deleted
steps.description:
> Do we want the power off to be attempted before the delete or after?

It will need to happen after the host has been marked to be deleted but before the CR is removed. We need to wait for cleaning to finish, then power the host off before removing the finalizer from the CR and allowing it to be deleted.

See the source issue for community-verified solutions.

steps.title: Confirm Host should be powered down once deleted is resolved
steps.description:
Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:
```bash
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=metal3-io -n metal3-io --tail=50 --since=5m
kubectl get events -n metal3-io --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm that the issue symptoms are gone.

resolution.summary:
> Do we want the power off to be attempted before the delete or after?

It will need to happen after the host has been marked to be deleted but before the CR is removed. We need to wait for cleaning to finish, then power the host off before removing the finalizer from the CR and allowing it to be deleted.

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with metal3-io installed or the issue environment reproducible.
